span.p:
T1-T3
Scaffold project
Smoke-test repo
Kick off Bab 1 + Bab 4

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T4-T6
Download OCDS
Run field-coverage audit
Split raw data into train/test

span.p:
T7-T10
Weak labels
Tier 1 + Tier 2 features
Materialize train/test artifacts

span.p:
T12-T16
Draft Bab 2 from real data
Run HPO on train-only dev splits
Review calibration subset
Lock metrics.json

span.p:
T17-T21
Draft Bab 3 from evidence
TreeSHAP explanations
ONNX parity
Narrative output
Counterfactual path

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T22-T26
Assemble training.ipynb
Assemble inference.ipynb
Sync proposal with metrics + figures
Generate final PDF

span.p:
Proposal lane
Bab 1 starts immediately
Bab 2 waits for real data
Bab 3 waits for implementation evidence
Bab 4 absorbs final metrics and figures

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Control rules
No HPO on test_data
No calibration on test_data
If bid fields are sparse: keep bid-derived features nullable
If DiCE is slow: ship SHAP fallback
